allow:
Bash(gh issue create -R tarazis/tasneef-ai \\
  --title "Handle quranapi downtime with graceful fallback" \\
  --label "mvp,bug" \\
  --milestone "v0.1 - MVP Launch" \\
  --body "When quranapi.pages.dev returns a non-200 or times out, show a user-facing error message in the sidebar instead of a blank result or silent failure. Include a retry button. Do not crash the sidebar.")

Bash(gh issue create -R tarazis/tasneef-ai \\
  --title "Handle Claude API errors: rate limit, invalid key, timeout" \\
  --label "mvp,bug" \\
  --milestone "v0.1 - MVP Launch" \\
  --body "Distinguish and surface three Claude API error states:
- Invalid/missing key: prompt user to check Settings
- Rate limit \(429\): tell user to wait and retry
- Timeout/network error: generic retry message

All should appear inline in the sidebar, not as silent failures.")
